content.hint: 表达下次想参加时，常用这个短语来缓和拒绝的语气
content.situation: 同事邀请你下班后一起去吃晚饭，你因已有安排想礼貌拒绝并表达下次参与的意愿
content.speakerText: Hey, we're heading to that new Italian place after work—want to come?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，我们下班后去那家新意大利餐厅，一起来吗？
content.knowledgePoint: 礼貌拒绝 + 表达未来参与意愿
content.responseTemplate: That sounds great! I've already made plans, but I'd love to join ___!

content.hint: 用这个短语表示自己正在减少社交活动，既幽默又不伤人
content.situation: 同事反复邀请你参加聚餐，你不想去但想用幽默方式回应并感谢邀请
content.speakerText: C’mon, you’ve missed three dinners this month—don’t be a ghost!
content.speakerTextCn: 来嘛，你这个月已经缺席三次聚餐了，别当隐形人！
content.responseTemplate: Haha, you got me—I’m trying to ___ this month. Thanks for inviting me though!

content.hint: 用这个短语表达你愿意下次参加，传递积极态度
content.situation: 同事热情邀请你参加下班后的小聚，你因疲惫想婉拒但不想显得冷漠
content.speakerText: We’re all grabbing a bite—don’t be a stranger!
content.speakerTextCn: 我们都要去吃点东西，别躲着啊！
content.knowledgePoint: 积极回应未来参与，避免负面语气
content.responseTemplate: I really appreciate the invite, but I’m a bit wiped today. ___ next time?

content.hint: 用于表达减少饮酒/社交的自我管理目标
content.template: I’m trying to ______ this month, but thanks so much for inviting me!
content.knowledgePoint: 场景惯用搭配（健康/节制表达）

content.scenarioHint: 同事邀请你下班后一起去吃饭，你不想去但想礼貌拒绝并表达下次参与的意愿
content.speakerText: We're heading out for dinner after work—want to come?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们下班后要去吃饭，一起来吗？
content.responseTemplate: That sounds great, but I ______. I'd really love to join next time!
content.hint: 用常见短语表达无法参加，语气要礼貌且积极
content.knowledgePoint: 礼貌拒绝邀请并表达未来参与意愿
